allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/travel-search -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"prompt\\":\\"quiero ir a Roma en mayo 5 dias desde Madrid\\"}")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); const pr=r.parsedRequest; console.log\('Origin:',pr.origin,'|','Destination:',pr.destination,'|','Duration:',pr.durationDays\); console.log\('Dest cities:',[...new Set\(r.flights.map\(f=>f.destinationCity\)\)].join\(', '\)\)}\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/travel-search -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"prompt\\":\\"quiero playa barata desde Barcelona en julio finde\\"}")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); const pr=r.parsedRequest; console.log\('Origin:',pr.origin,'| TripType:',pr.tripType,'| Flexible:',pr.flexibleDestination,'| Duration:',pr.durationDays\); console.log\('Dest recs:',\(r.destinationRecommendations||[]\).map\(d=>d.city\).join\(', '\)\)}\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/travel-search -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"prompt\\":\\"tengo 200 euros quiero ir a una ciudad europea bonita 4 dias\\"}")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); const pr=r.parsedRequest; console.log\('Budget:',pr.budget,'| TripType:',pr.tripType,'| Duration:',pr.durationDays,'| Flexible:',pr.flexibleDestination\)}\)")
